fields.description: Testing only: lets a cashier open a new register while they still have another open POS Opening Entry. Keep OFF in production.
fields.label: Allow opening a new register while another shift is open

fields.description: Offline cache only keeps items that have stock in the register's warehouse (smaller, faster cache)
fields.label: Cache only in-stock items for offline use

fields.description: Show stock items that are out of stock (qty 0 or less) in the sell grid. Off = only items with stock are shown (non-stock items like services always show).
fields.label: Show out-of-stock items in the grid

fields.description: New gift cards expire this many days after sale. 0 = never expire.
fields.label: Gift Card Expiry (days)

fields.description: Serial numbers must be SCANNED with a barcode scanner — manual typing is rejected at the till. Turn off if a scanner is unavailable.
fields.label: Require scanning for serial numbers (block manual typing)

fields.description: Mode of Payment used to redeem gift cards. Leave empty to auto-create/use "Gift Card".
fields.label: Gift Card Mode of Payment

fields.description: Liability account that backs gift cards (selling a card increases it, redeeming decreases it). Leave empty to auto-create "Gift Cards".
fields.label: Gift Card Liability Account

fields.description: Non-stock item posted when a gift card is sold. Leave empty to auto-create "GIFT-CARD".
fields.label: Gift Card Item

fields.description: Refunds may only go back to a payment method the customer actually used on the original sale (plus Store Credit). Add rules below to allow extra refund methods per paid method.
fields.label: Restrict refunds to the original payment method

fields.description: Extra allowed refund methods. Example: if paid with Mada, allow refund as Cash. A method can always be refunded to itself, so you only add the exceptions.
fields.label: Refund Method Rules

fields.description: Block regular returns after the return window below. Past the window, the cashier can send a return-approval request that an Approver Role holder approves while the register is open.
fields.label: Limit regular returns to a time window

fields.description: Days after the sale during which a regular return is allowed. 0 = no time limit.
fields.label: Return window (days)

fields.description: Reasons the cashier picks from when refunding an item. Add or remove freely. The till also always offers "Other" for a free-text reason.
fields.label: Return Reasons

fields.description: Manual discounts above this percentage need approval. 0 disables the check.
fields.label: Discount Limit (%)

fields.description: How a cashier clears an over-limit discount. Passcode only = a manager enters the passcode at the till. Request only = the cashier sends a request a role-holder approves while the register is open. Passcode or request = either.
fields.label: Over-limit approval method
fields.options:
Passcode only
Request only
Passcode or request

fields.description: Users holding this role (plus LumenPOS/System Managers) can approve discount AND return requests. Requests can only be approved while the cashier's register is still open.
fields.label: Approver Role (for requests)

fields.description: Each manager gets their own passcode; the approver's name is recorded on the invoice. The single Manager Passcode above still works as a master code.
fields.label: Discount Approvers

fields.description: Restrict till actions to staff holding a role. Leave a role blank to allow everyone. System / LumenPOS Managers always pass.
fields.label: Permissions

fields.description: Only this role (plus managers) may apply a manual discount / edit a price on a sale. Blank = anyone.
fields.label: Edit price / discount role

fields.description: Only this role (plus managers) may make returns. Blank = anyone with sell access.
fields.label: Make returns role

fields.description: This role (plus managers) may return a sale past the return window WITHOUT an approval request. Blank = nobody bypasses (everyone uses the request flow).
fields.label: Exceed return window role

fields.description: Turn till features on or off. Each control is independent.
fields.label: Features

fields.description: Allow a single discount on the whole cart (subject to the discount limit + edit-price role).
fields.label: Order-level (whole-cart) discount

fields.description: Add a service charge to every sale (e.g. restaurants / salons).
fields.label: Service charge

fields.description: Income account the service charge posts to.
fields.label: Service charge account

fields.description: Show a Price check button to look up an item's price + stock without selling it.
fields.label: Price / stock checker

fields.description: Allow printing an X-report (mid-shift drawer read) without closing the register.
fields.label: X-report (mid-shift read)

fields.description: Record sensitive actions (over-limit discounts, returns, price edits, register open/close) to the LumenPOS Audit Log.
fields.label: Audit log

fields.description: Show an Email receipt button so a copy can be sent to the customer's email.
fields.label: Email receipt

fields.description: Show a Favourites grid of one-tap items on the sell screen.
fields.label: Quick keys / favourites

fields.description: Items shown as one-tap buttons on the sell screen.
fields.label: Quick keys

fields.description: Logo shown at the top of the printed/on-screen receipt.
fields.label: Receipt logo

fields.description: Extra line under the company name (e.g. VAT no., branch).
fields.label: Receipt header

fields.description: Footer line (e.g. return policy, thank-you, social).
fields.label: Receipt footer
